title: calyptocarpus biaristatus
intro: Calyptocarpus biaristatus, also known as the lesser marigold or creeping zinnia, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The leaves of Calyptocarpus biaristatus have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Calyptocarpus biaristatus can be consumed as a tea, infused in oil for topical use, or used in combination with other herbs to create a tonic for various health purposes.
